title: Section 11
content: 1[11. Term of office of Chairperson of Appellate Tribunal.-- The Chairperson of an Appellate Tribunal shall hold office for a term of five years from the date on which he enters upon his office and shall be eligible for reappointment: Provided that no person shall hold office as the Chairperson of a Appellate Tribunal after he has attained the age of seventy years.]
footnote: 1 Subs. by Act 44 of 2016, s. 30, for section 11 (w.e.f. 1-9-2016).
